project_type: TypeScript monorepo - AI-native ecosystem platform with 13 apps, 17 services, 40 packages
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + Turbo. Each package has its own build/typecheck/test/lint scripts. Root commands: pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm build, pnpm lint
test_framework: vitest with vitest run. Tests in src/__tests__/ directories within packages.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, 2. pnpm typecheck, 3. pnpm build, 4. pnpm test, 5. pnpm lint, 6. pnpm audit --audit-level=high
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node 22, pnpm available. No Docker daemon for actual builds. Terraform/Helm CLI not installed - static validation only.
contribution_requirements: All quality gates must pass after changes. Do not weaken global strictness. Prefer small verifiable increments. Every phase must end with command output evidence.
key_patterns: Fastify-based services using @quant/server-core for app scaffold. Packages use zod for validation. Health endpoints at /healthz and /readyz already exist via health plugin and @quant/health-server. OTel package at packages/observability with DistributedTracer, StructuredLogger, MetricsCollector, CanaryAnalyzer, SLOTracker, BurnRateCalculator, RunbookGenerator, SyntheticMonitor, DashboardConfigGenerator. Helm chart at infra/helm/quant-platform with values.yaml, values-staging.yaml, values-production.yaml.
directory_structure: apps/ - 13 frontend apps (Next.js). services/ - 17 backend services (Fastify). packages/ - 40 shared packages. infra/ - Helm, Terraform, ArgoCD, Grafana, OTel, Prometheus configs. .github/workflows/ - CI/CD pipelines. k6/ - load test scripts.
